meaning: adj.庆祝的,喜庆的,欢乐的,节日似
examples: The 32-page catalogue is chock-full of things that add fun to festive occasions.
The whole town is in festive mood.
The town has a festive holiday atmosphere.
While some Romans retreat to the countryside on Easter, the city remains festive and crowded.
The 95 Australian dollar ticket price includes Christmas eggnog, a festive three-course meal and Champagne throughout the evening.
